mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: renal cyst, splenomegaly, neurological symptoms (restlessness, somatic sensory dysfunction, axonal degeneration)
skeletal anomalies (abnormal hip joint morphology, short stature), corneal opacities (foveal hyperpigmentation), respiratory issues (progressive pulmonary function impairment)
renal involvement (renal cysts, proteinuria), angiopathy (hypertension, varicose veins, livedo reticularis), gastrointestinal problems (diarrhea, abdominal pain, malabsorption)
coarse facial features, mental and motor developmental delays, progressive hearing loss, cardiac valve thickening
tall stature, disproportionate limb length, scoliosis, pectus excavatum, ectopia lentis, mitral valve prolapse
easy bruising, excessive scarring, vascular fragility leading to hemorrhages or ruptures, intestinal complications
café au lait spots, neurofibromas, iris hamartomas, optic glioma, bone deformities
demyelination causing muscle weakness, irritability, seizures, visual disturbances
early childhood onset diabetes mellitus, sensorineural hearing loss, pigmentary changes, obesity, kidney failure
